name: Citizens State Bank Of La Crosse
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank with locations in Clayton, La Crosse, Onalaska, Eau Claire, and Altoona, Wisconsin, offering checking, savings, mortgages, and business accounts.
description_long:
Citizens State Bank was established in Clayton, Wisconsin in 1907 as a partner to farmers, helping them purchase land, equipment, seed, and livestock. The bank expanded significantly with a move to La Crosse in 2005 (new headquarters), followed by Onalaska in 2008, Eau Claire in 2010, and Altoona in 2011. Today, it operates as one of the fastest-growing banks in Wisconsin since 2005.

The bank offers personal and business checking and savings accounts, including their proprietary Get More™ and Get More™ w/Interest checking accounts powered by the BaZing app. They provide comprehensive mortgage lending services for home purchases and refinancing, along with standard banking services like deposits, loans, and account management. The bank is FDIC-insured and holds NMLS #402159.

Citizens State Bank differentiates itself through what they call the "Citizens Experience"—a high-energy banking environment with a 2-Hour Rule Guarantee on voicemail and email responses. They emphasize value-added services beyond traditional banking, such as offering Colectivo Coffee at drive-thru windows. The bank has been recognized as a Best Bank to Work For by American Banker and positions itself as creating customer happiness rather than simply processing transactions.

The company operates within Wisconsin only with five physical locations. While their website emphasizes customer experience and value-added services, specific details about loan terms, interest rates, fees, and competitive advantages versus other regional banks are limited. Their focus appears primarily on relationship banking and employee culture rather than digital-first or national banking services.
services: Personal checking accounts (Get More™ and Get More™ w/Interest)
BaZing app for account management and discounts
Drive-thru banking services with coffee amenities
pros: FDIC-insured with backing by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
2-Hour Rule Guarantee ensures all voicemails and emails answered within 2 business hours
Get More™ checking accounts offer savings and discounts through BaZing app integration
Unique value-added amenities like Colectivo Coffee at drive-thru locations
Named Best Bank to Work For by American Banker, suggesting strong institutional stability
Multi-location presence across Wisconsin (Clayton, La Crosse, Onalaska, Eau Claire, Altoona)
Full-service mortgage lending with personalized consultation approach
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Wisconsin only; no national or online-only options
Website provides minimal details on specific interest rates, fees, or loan terms for comparison
No mention of mobile banking app features, online account opening, or digital-first capabilities
Small regional bank with fewer branch locations than major national competitors
Limited information about business account features, commercial lending terms, or SBA loan availability
best_for: Wisconsin residents seeking personalized community banking with high-touch customer service
Small business owners and farmers in central Wisconsin looking for relationship-based lending
Homebuyers in Wisconsin interested in mortgage services with personal consultation
diagnosis: Best for Wisconsin-based customers and small business owners who value personalized service, community relationships, and local banking presence over digital convenience or competitive rate shopping. The main caveat is limited geographic availability and minimal transparency on pricing, making it essential to contact branches directly for rate and fee comparisons with other banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
